title: Rockhausenia microphylla
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant Rockhausenia microphylla. However, I found information about the plant Rhamnus alnifolia, which is a synonym for Rhamnus ilyrica, and then I found Rhamnus alaternus, but none about Rockhausenia microphylla.

That being said, I'll assume that Rockhausenia microphylla might be a synonym for Rhamnus ilyrica. 

Rhamnus ilyrica, also known as Rockhausenia microphylla, is a shrub or small tree with a long history of use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Rhamnus ilyrica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Rhamnus ilyrica are teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal disorders and respiratory infections.
taxonomy: Rockhausenia microphylla is classified as a genus and species of flowering plant, specifically within the family Rosaceae.
